name: Cocoa Pecan Crescents
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: www.hersheys.com
1. In a large bowl, beat butter and granulated sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Stir together flour, cocoa, and salt; gradually add to butter mixture, blending well.
3. Stir in pecans. Cover; refrigerate dough for 1 hour or until firm enough to handle.
4. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
5. Shape the dough into logs about 2-1/2 inches long.
6. Place logs on an ungreased cookie sheet.
7. Roll logs into crescents, tapering ends.
8. Bake for 13 to 15 minutes or until set.
9. Cool slightly; remove from cookie sheet and place on a wire rack.
10. Cool completely.
11. Roll in powdered sugar.
Makes about 3-1/2 dozen cookies.
